'''Zeta Zero Nine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[the Wastes]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
In the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet was the site of the secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Underwater Zeta Zero Nine base|research facility]] of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Jesco Comark]]'s [[Death-Hunter Cyborg|Death Hunter]] [[Operation Death-Hunter|project]], transforming captured [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from nearby [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]] into loyal [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] assassins. The facility was eventually destroyed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agents and nearly all of the captured humans were freed.<ref name="DH" />
